chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 6009 of 2025 [Javed Iqbal v. FOP & others] Petitioner: Javed Iqbal son of Sheikh Abdul Wakeel, Advocate in person. Date of hearing: 17-12-2025 Date of decision: 17-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Petitioner claims to be a retired employee of PIA and has challenged its privatization. However, the Petitioner is unable to cite any provision of law that is being violated in the privatization process. No material has been annexed to the petition in support of the contentions. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as misconceived. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
